# Jobbyist South Africa

> South Africa's job discovery and career management platform — find verified vacancies, career resources, and tools for job seekers and employers.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Search jobs across South Africa and remote roles for SA talent.
- [Browse jobs](/jobs): Filter vacancies by location, type, level, salary, and remote-friendly status.
- [Companies](/companies): Profiles of South African employers actively hiring.
- [Jobseekers](/jobseekers): Public talent directory for recruiters.
- [Knowledge Hub](/knowledge-hub): Interview packs, ATS-friendly CV templates, salary guides, career roadmaps.
- [Resume builder](/resume-builder): Free South African CV builder with ATS-ready templates.
- [Upskilling programs](/upskilling): Curated learning paths for in-demand SA careers.
- [Job matcher](/job-matcher): AI-powered matching of your CV to live SA jobs.
- [Jobbyist Pro](/pro): Premium subscription with auto-apply, priority placement, and analytics.
- [About](/about): Mission, team, and how Jobbyist tackles SA unemployment.
- [Premium advertising](/ads): Sponsored placement options for brands targeting SA professionals.

## Locations

- [Johannesburg jobs](/jobs/johannesburg)
- [Pretoria jobs](/jobs/pretoria)
- [Cape Town jobs](/jobs/cape-town)
- [Durban jobs](/jobs/durban)
- [Remote jobs for South Africans](/jobs/remote)

## Optional

- [Cookies](/cookies): Cookie policy.
